text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Aaargggh! I can't believe I got injured this baaad!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Shiraoki, why have you forsaken meeee!
choice_data_list: I feel like you're exaggerating a little.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You say that, but it's such a serious injury... This is
decisive proof that the great Shiraoki is no longer
looking out for me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Urk... Who even am I without the grace of
Shiraoki?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I'm a fried egg with no yolk!
choice_data_list: Let's pay a visit to the shrine, then.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hic... We should... I'd like to plead to my case to Shiraoki.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'll say that I still have more potential in me...
That I'll work really hard... So please... don't
abandon my pitiful, no-good self.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: But should my plea go ignored, I'll...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm w-willing to give my precious 5,000-yen bill
as an offering...

We go to a nearby shrine together, but neither
Matikanefukukitaru's spirits nor her motivation
show much sign of returning. This situation has
really dampened her mood.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huh?! T-Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Urk... I think it's amazing how you're able to say
stuff like that so confidently.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm so wishy-washy in comparison. We're like
apples and oranges. Except I'm just a crab apple
and you're an... orange.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Just a sad little craaab apple.

Being miserable doesn't help with healing
injuries... It takes a long time for her to make a
full recovery.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: But... I have no one left. I'm all alone...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ohhh... Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Waaah! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I'll work really hard... I promise!

Matikanefukukitaru and I both focus our efforts
on recovery, determined to get back to training!
